user.description: Set up an Anthem receiver connected over RS-232. The port can be a local serial device (for example /dev/ttyUSB0) or a serialx URL such as socket://192.168.1.50:4999 or esphome://my-node. The port is probed automatically to detect the model, protocol generation, and baud rate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to open the serial port.
error.no_receiver: No Anthem receiver responded on this port. Check the cable (straight-wired DB-9) and that the receiver is powered.

abort.already_configured: This serial port is already configured.
